name: PAR TECHNOLOGY CORP
summary: PAR Technology Corporation provides unified technology platforms for the restaurant and retail industries. Its products include PAR POS point-of-sale systems, Punchh loyalty and engagement platform, PAR Ordering digital ordering solutions, PAR OPS operations management, Data Central back-office analytics, Delaget restaurant analytics, PAR Retail solutions, and PAR Pay payment services. The company serves multi-unit restaurant brands and retail operators with both software-as-a-service and hardware offerings.

products.name: Punchh
products.description: Loyalty and customer engagement platform for restaurants and retail.

products.name: PAR Ordering
products.description: Digital ordering solution for restaurant brands.

products.name: PAR OPS
products.description: Operations management platform for restaurant operators.

products.name: Data Central
products.description: Back-office analytics and management software for restaurants.

products.name: Delaget
products.description: Restaurant analytics and operations intelligence platform.

products.name: PAR Pay / PAR Payment Services
products.description: Payment processing and services for restaurant and retail customers.
